name: Mustard-Rosemary Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dried Rosemary, or 3 sprigs Fresh Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. The mixture should have a watery, pasty consistency.
3. Marinate lamb, chicken, beef, or any other meat overnight.
4. After marinating, grill the meat or broil it until a sauce forms on top.
5. Pour the sauce over roasted potatoes.
